parameters: This path's crawling with enemies. We need to find another route.
It doesn't matter to me if the king's human or demon! My job's the
same either way! Hey! Soup's on!
Alright! It's searing nicely! This is going to be the best steak ever!
The bigwigs are always dealing with complicated problems, right?
I need to make them delicious food to help them relax.
